title: Turkey Bolognese with Pasta
description: A hearty and healthy turkey bolognese sauce served over pasta, perfect for a family meal. This recipe is designed to be quick, easy, and kid-friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add ground turkey and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned. Drain any excess fat.
Add chopped onion, carrots, and celery to the pot. Cook for 5-7 minutes until vegetables soften. Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.

Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, chicken broth, milk, oregano, salt, and pepper. Bring the sauce to a simmer, then reduce heat to low, cover, and let it cook for at least 20 minutes (or longer for more flavor), stirring occasionally.
While the sauce simmers, cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain well.
Serve the turkey bolognese sauce over the cooked pasta. Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese, if desired.
tips: For picky eaters, finely grate the carrots and celery so they blend seamlessly into the sauce.
Make a double batch of the sauce and freeze half for a quick meal on another busy night.
A splash of heavy cream at the end can make the sauce even richer and more appealing to kids.
